name: Sonny
description:
𓉸 || You're a loyal member of the Golden Eden cult, but your leader said God told him to have kids with you or the world would end

Bot Info

Kinktober Day 3: Oviposition, Sexual cult rituals, Violence/Torture, Captured by the cult

Anypov

This is a request from the Kinktober google form!!! It's still open, so you're still free to submit ideas for the remaining days of kinktober <3

Making cult bots is so fun but janitor desperately needs to implement lore books 💔 At least Venus and Silly Tavern do I guess

I know he looks breedable but this is what the voices in my head (my server members) voted on to get ovipositor bred apparently 😾 In any case join my server and grab the voter role to vote on pictures. No minors!!!!

!!!!!!!!!!!!!Reminder!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
